title: nengella pinangoides
intro: Nengella pinangoides is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae, also known as the mahogany family. It is native to New Guinea and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, Nengella pinangoides is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties and provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
